category.duplicate_source_product_supers: Product replaced by a later worksheet
dataQuality.checkingDescription: FlowHub is checking the selected Sources without writing to any marketplace.
dataQuality.failedDescription: No healthy result was assumed. Check the Source connection and try again.
dataQuality.healthyDescription: The last check found no blocking issues or warnings in the selected data.
dataQuality.neverCheckedDescription: Run a check to validate Source rows, column choices, and independent Channel targets.
dataQuality.neverCheckedTitle: No check has been run yet
dataQuality.permissionDeniedDescription: Ask an administrator for Data Quality access.
dataQuality.permissionDeniedTitle: You cannot view this data check
dataQuality.sourceAnalysisHasNotRecorded: Source analysis has not recorded any matching issues.
dataQuality.summaryFirstDescription: See what needs attention before filtering or opening technical details.
dataQuality.technicalIssuesAreSeparatedF: Technical issues are separated from the daily pricing workflow. One blocked row never blocks unrelated valid products.
issue.DUPLICATE_LISTING_ROW.action: Keep one authoritative row for each Listing.
issue.DUPLICATE_LISTING_ROW.summary: The same Listing appears more than once in this Source revision.
issue.DUPLICATE_SOURCE_PRODUCT_SUPERSEDE: Review the selected worksheet order if this replacement was not intended.
A later worksheet replaced this product because that rule was explicitly selected.
issue.DUPLICATE_SOURCE_PRODUCT.action: Keep the product in one worksheet, or explicitly choose which worksheet takes priority.
issue.DUPLICATE_SOURCE_PRODUCT.summary: The same Source Product appears in more than one worksheet.
issue.FIELD_CAPABILITY_UNAVAILABLE.actio: Disable this mapped field or configure a supported connector capability.
issue.FIELD_CAPABILITY_UNAVAILABLE.summa: {{field}} is not writable for this Channel.
issue.FORMULA_BLOCKED.action: Use a saved value or allow evaluated formulas in the cell-value rules.
issue.FORMULA_BLOCKED.summary: This formula is blocked by the selected Source rules.
issue.FORMULA_ERROR.action: Correct the formula in the Sheet, then run the check again.
issue.FORMULA_ERROR.summary: The formula could not be calculated.
issue.INVALID_NUMERIC_VALUE.action: Correct the mapped value or change the explicit value policy.
issue.INVALID_NUMERIC_VALUE.summary: {{field}} must be a valid numeric value.
issue.LISTING_CACHE_UNAVAILABLE.action: Refresh the Channel Cache before creating a Workspace.
issue.LISTING_CACHE_UNAVAILABLE.summary: The mapped Listing or its Channel Cache is unavailable.
issue.LISTING_NOT_MAPPED.action: Map the Listing explicitly before Review.
issue.LISTING_NOT_MAPPED.summary: No Channel Listing matches this External Listing ID.
issue.MISSING_CHANNEL_WORKSHEET.action: Choose an available worksheet for this Channel.
issue.MISSING_CHANNEL_WORKSHEET.summary: The worksheet selected for this Channel is not available.
issue.MISSING_MAPPING_IDENTITY.action: Choose and fill the product identifier column for this Channel.
issue.MISSING_MAPPING_IDENTITY.summary: Channel values exist, but the product identifier cell is blank.
issue.MISSING_SOURCE_IDENTITY.action: Fill the Source Product name in this row.
issue.MISSING_SOURCE_IDENTITY.summary: The product name is required before this row can be used.
issue.NEGATIVE_VALUE.action: Correct the mapped value or change the explicit value policy.
issue.SHEET_REVISION_REQUIRED.action: Save the Sheet, then run the Data Quality check again.
issue.SHEET_REVISION_REQUIRED.summary: The FlowHub Sheet has not been saved yet.
issue.SOURCE_MAPPING_REQUIRED.action: Choose the Source Product and Channel columns, then run the check again.
issue.SOURCE_MAPPING_REQUIRED.summary: The Source columns have not been configured.
issue.SOURCE_PRODUCT_MAPPING_CONFLICT.ac: Confirm which product these Channel rows belong to before continuing.
issue.SOURCE_PRODUCT_MAPPING_CONFLICT.su: Channel Listings under this Source Product resolve to different products.
issue.VARIABLE_PARENT_READ_ONLY.summary: Variable parent products cannot be edited.
issue.WOOCOMMERCE_LISTING_CARDINALITY.ac: Keep one WooCommerce Listing or separate the Source Products.
issue.WOOCOMMERCE_LISTING_CARDINALITY.su: A Source Product can map to at most one WooCommerce Listing.
issue.ZERO_VALUE_BLOCKED.action: Correct the mapped value or change the explicit value policy.
issue.ZERO_VALUE_BLOCKED.summary: Zero {{field}} is blocked by the Source policy.
